settings.errorEndpointRequired: API endpoint is required for local server
settings.errorInvalidGoogleKey: Google API keys should start with 'AIza...'
settings.errorInvalidGroqKey: Groq API keys should start with 'gsk_...'
settings.errorDuplicateCustomName: A custom provider with this name already exists
settings.cardTemplatesDesc: Customize the HTML and CSS templates for exported flashcards
settings.cardStyleDesc: Edit front, back HTML and CSS styling
settings.fieldsDesc: Customize field names and note type
settings.noteTypeNameDesc: The Note Type name used in Anki. If you customize the template, you may want a custom name.
settings.availableVarsInfo: These placeholders are replaced with the actual field values when Anki renders the card. Use them in Front/Back HTML to display content.
settings.cardFrontHtmlInfo: The front side of the flashcard shown during review. This is what you see first and try to recall the answer from.
settings.cardBackHtmlInfo: The back side revealed after you flip the card. Usually contains the answer, audio, images and additional info.
settings.cardCssInfo: CSS styling applied to both front and back of the card. Controls fonts, colors, layout and appearance.
transcribe.inputPathDesc: Enter or edit the path to the audio/video file.
transcribe.outputPathDesc: Enter or edit the output SRT file path.
